## Executive Summary
JPMorgan Chase reports net income of $57.0B on revenue of $182.4B for FY2025, with diluted EPS of $20.05. Revenue reached $182.4B, net income $57.0B, and diluted EPS $20.05 for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.; Net margin stood at 31.3% for the period.; Prior-period comparative figures are not available in the provided data.

## Financials
- Revenue: $182.4B – Total revenue as reported in XBRL data for the period ending 2025-12-31.
- Net Income: $57.0B – Net income attributable to JPMorgan Chase.
- Diluted EPS: $20.05 – Earnings per share on a diluted basis.
- Net Margin: 31.3% – Net income as a percentage of revenue.
- Profitability: Net margin of 31.3% indicates a high level of profitability relative to revenue.
- Cash flow: Not disclosed—cash flow statement data not provided in the excerpts.
